---
title: "Thesis Simulator"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r message = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(airportr)
library(gganimate)
library(ggimage)
library(maps)
library(gifski)
library(geosphere)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
```

```{r}

airports <- c("RDU", "ATL", "BNA", "CMH", "IAD")

tailnums <- c("A", "B", "C", "D")

times <- seq(from = as.POSIXct("2025-10-09 10:00"), 
             to   = as.POSIXct("2025-10-09 18:00"), 
             by   = "1 hour")

set.seed(115)

make_flights_for_plane <- function(tail) {
  origin <- "RDU"
  flights <- map_df(times, function(t) {
    dest <- sample(setdiff(airports, origin), 1)
    row <- tibble(
      tailnum = tail,
      dep_time = t,
      arr_time = t + minutes(40),
      origin = origin,
      dest = dest
    )
    origin <<- dest
    row
  })
  flights
}

flights <- map_df(tailnums, make_flights_for_plane) |>
  select(-dest)

flights <- flights |>
  arrange(tailnum, dep_time) |>
  mutate(dest = lead(origin)) |>
  mutate(flight_time = arr_time - dep_time) |>
  ungroup() |>
  left_join(airportr::airports |>
              select(IATA, origin_lat = Latitude, origin_lon = Longitude),
            by = c("origin" = "IATA")) |>
  left_join(airportr::airports |>
              select(IATA, dest_lat = Latitude, dest_lon = Longitude),
            by = c("dest" = "IATA")) |>
  group_by(tailnum) |>
  mutate(next_dep = lead(dep_time)) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    flight_times = list(seq(dep_time, arr_time, by = "10 min")),
    ground_times = list(
      if (!is.na(next_dep))
        seq(arr_time + minutes(10), next_dep, by = "10 min")
      else
        as.POSIXct(NA)
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(all_times = list(na.omit(c(flight_times, ground_times)))) |>
  unnest(all_times, names_repair = "minimal") |>
  rename(time = all_times) |>
  mutate(
    phase = if_else(time <= arr_time, "airborne", "ground"),
    frac = pmax(
      0,
      pmin(
        as.numeric(difftime(time, dep_time, units = "secs")) /
          as.numeric(difftime(arr_time, dep_time, units = "secs")),
        1
      )
    ),
    latitude = if_else(
      phase == "airborne",
      origin_lat + frac * (dest_lat - origin_lat),
      dest_lat
    ),
    longitude = if_else(
      phase == "airborne",
      origin_lon + frac * (dest_lon - origin_lon),
      dest_lon
    )
  ) |>
  select(tailnum, time, latitude, longitude, origin, dest, phase) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(tailnum) |>
  mutate(
    heading = bearing(cbind(longitude, latitude), cbind(lead(longitude), lead(latitude)))
  ) |>
  ungroup()

flights
```

```{r}

usa <- map_data("state")

# flights$img <- "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/56/Avion_silhouette.png"

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = usa, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = "gray90", 
               color = "white") +
  geom_path(data = flights,aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, group = tailnum, 
                               color = phase)) +
  geom_point(data = flights, aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, color = phase), size = 3) +
  # geom_image(data = flights, aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, image = img, 
  #                                angle = heading), size = 0.05) +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_fixed(1.3, xlim = c(-90, -70), ylim = c(30, 45)) +
  labs(
    title = 'Flights: USA',
    subtitle = 'Time: {frame_time}',
    x = 'Longitude', y = 'Latitude'
  ) +
  ease_aes('linear') +
  transition_time(time)

animate(p, fps = 15, duration = 20)
```
